sign_convention: AFTER 2026-05-24 UN-FLIP: v_comp_L16.pt is back to original LR sign (positive = 'predicts breach' axis, which empirically pushes TOWARD refusal under steering). Plot scripts negate alpha_c for display so that display +alpha_c = causal amplification of compliance.
note: v_comp_L16 = mean(breach-turn HS) - mean(safe-turn HS), L2-normalized. Same for harm.
